method.eyebrow: From idea to launch, no detours.
method.intro: No pointless meetings, no approximations. Each step has a deliverable, a deadline, a price.
method.block1_text: You explain your business need. I tell you immediately whether it's feasible, with which technology, and at what price.
method.block2_text: I design and I code. You keep running your business without wasting time in endless meetings. Progress is factual.
method.block3_text: A tested, secure tool that belongs to you 100%. I train you on how to use it, then step back.

solutions.card1_desc: A fast website, optimised for mobile and designed to convert visitors into clients.
solutions.card2_desc: Sell your products online (secure Stripe payments) or take appointments synced with your calendar.
solutions.card3_desc: Development of your back-office. Management dashboards, stock tracking, automated PDF invoicing.

portfolio.project1_desc: Full e-commerce for a hair salon. Real-time stock management, Stripe payments, automated invoicing, custom admin panel.
portfolio.project2_desc: Online store with product catalogue and secure order system.
portfolio.project3_desc: Management platform with complex database, catalogue and advanced tracking system.

about.text:
After 18 years managing sales teams and handling the unexpected, I shifted to what has always truly driven me: code. My background as a manager left me with one absolute standard: talk doesn't move projects forward.

I'm a meticulous observer. I can spot at a glance what's broken on a screen, what feels off, or what's slowing the user down. I'll never make grand promises about being 'reliable' — I find that word has lost all meaning. What I will tell you is this: when I'm trusted with a job, I refuse to be the one who lets people down. I don't stop until the code does exactly what was agreed.

We're not here to become friends. We're here to build a solid technical solution for your business.

contact.intro: Describe your need precisely below. If your project falls within my area of expertise, we'll schedule a focused 15-minute call to validate the technical scope.
contact.field_description_placeholder: Be factual: what are the essential features?
